message:
test(service): wave 30 – 17 data-type trait tests for retry + concurrency_limit

Cover RetryLayer, Retry, RetryFuture, LimitedRetry, NoRetry,
ConcurrencyLimitLayer, ConcurrencyLimit, ConcurrencyLimitError,
ConcurrencyLimitFuture, State Debug/Clone/Copy/Default/accessors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
